complaint_text: There was chewing gum stuck under almost every seat in the coach I traveled in this morning, quite unpleasant.
The women's washroom at Alambagh station had no soap and the floor was flooded with water.
Empty water bottles and food wrappers were lying scattered near the escalator entrance at Munshipulia station.
I noticed pigeon droppings on the platform bench at Badshahnagar station, nobody has cleaned it in days.
The dustbins at Charbagh station were overflowing and the smell was really bad near the ticket counter.
Paan stains on the stairs near gate 1 of Hazratganj station make it slippery and unhygienic.
Train floor was sticky, looked like something had spilled and was never mopped up.
The AC vents inside the coach have visible dust buildup, could be a health concern for regular commuters.
Spider webs in the corner of the ticket counter area at Krishna Nagar station, hasn't been cleaned in a long time.
Kindly look into the cleanliness of platform 2 at IT College station, cigarette butts everywhere despite it being a no-smoking zone.
Trains on the north-south corridor are running nearly 12 minutes apart during evening peak hours, way too infrequent.
I missed an important meeting because the train at Singar Nagar station didn't arrive for almost 25 minutes with zero announcement.
Service was unusually slow today, three trains passed on the opposite track before mine finally showed up.
There is no consistency in timing on weekends, sometimes I wait 8 minutes, sometimes 20.
Train halted for nearly 7 minutes between Durgapuri and Mawaiya with no explanation given over the speaker.
Frequency during college hours near Vishwavidyalaya station is simply not enough, platforms get very congested while waiting.
Last train timing needs review, I almost got stranded at Transport Nagar station last night as it left earlier than the app showed.
The metro app showed 4 minutes but the actual train arrived after nearly 15, please fix the live tracking.
Repeated delays this whole week on my daily commute from Amausi, starting to affect my office attendance.
Why is the first train of the day at CCS Airport station always 5-6 minutes late? This defeats the purpose of an early departure.
An unattended black backpack has been sitting near the ticket vending machines at Hussainganj station for over 20 minutes, nobody has checked it.
A group of men were smoking openly on platform 1 at Alambagh Bus Station despite CCTV cameras clearly visible.
I was followed by a stranger from the station exit at Sachivalaya all the way to the parking area, felt very unsafe.
Two passengers got into a physical fight inside the coach near Lekhraj Market station, security intervened only after several minutes.
My phone was pickpocketed while boarding a crowded train at Charbagh station during peak hour.
There's a broken glass panel near the emergency exit at Bhootnath Market station, could easily cause injury.
A woman was being harassed by a group of youths on the platform at KD Singh Babu Stadium station, staff response was slow.
Noticed a fire extinguisher missing from its designated spot near gate 3 of Munshipulia station.
An elderly passenger collapsed near the AFC gates at Badshahnagar station and it took too long for medical help to arrive.
CCTV camera near the parking lot exit at Amausi station appears to be non-functional, the red light isn't blinking anymore.
My GoSmart card balance was deducted for a trip I never took from Munshipulia station.
The token dispensing machine at Hazratganj station keeps rejecting Rs. 100 notes even though they aren't damaged.
AFC gate 2 at Charbagh station doesn't open on the first tap, I have to scan my QR code three or four times every day.
I was charged the full fare instead of the student concession rate despite having a valid ID card.
Recharge done via UPI on the app succeeded and money was deducted, but the balance never updated in my card.
There is no way to get a physical receipt after topping up a smart card at the counter, creates issues for reimbursement.
Ticket counter at Alambagh station had only one staff member on duty during a Monday morning rush, queue was almost 15 minutes long.
Return refund for a wrongly booked ticket on the mobile app has not been processed even after 10 days.
The exit gate at Vishwavidyalaya station charged me for an extra zone I never traveled through.
QR ticket generated from the app failed to scan at both entry and exit gates at Transport Nagar station, had to buy a fresh token.
The upward escalator at Hazratganj station has been shut for repair for over a week now with no signage explaining why.
Lift at Badshahnagar station stopped working mid-way with two passengers inside, quite a scary experience.
Escalator steps at IT College station are uneven near the bottom, I nearly tripped while stepping off.
The lift button panel at Munshipulia station is broken, only the ground floor button actually works.
Escalator handrail keeps moving faster than the steps at Sachivalaya station, doesn't feel synced correctly.
Only one of the two lifts at Charbagh station is operational, causing long waits for wheelchair users.
Loud grinding noise coming from the escalator motor near platform 1 at Krishna Nagar station, sounds unsafe.
Lift doors at Alambagh Bus Station don't close fully, they stay slightly ajar even after the buzzer sounds.
Escalator at Durgapuri station was running but had an 'out of service' sign still placed in front of it, confusing commuters.
The lift at Amausi station smells of urine and appears to not have been cleaned in a long time.
The CISF guard at Charbagh station spoke very rudely when I asked for directions to the parking area.
Ticket counter staff at Hazratganj refused to explain why my card recharge failed, just kept saying 'system issue' without helping further.
A female passenger was scolded unnecessarily loudly by a station staff member for taking too long to scan her ticket.
Housekeeping staff ignored my request to clean a spill near the bench, said it wasn't their assigned area.
Announcer on duty at Sachivalaya station gave instructions in a very impatient and dismissive tone over the PA system.
A staff member at the customer help desk in Alambagh station was on a personal call and made me wait 10 minutes without acknowledging me.
The gateman at KD Singh Babu Stadium station argued with a senior citizen instead of helping her understand the fare chart.
Staff at the lost and found counter in Charbagh station were dismissive when I reported my lost umbrella, didn't even note it down.
One of the guards near the parking exit at Lekhraj Market station was rude to an auto driver trying to drop off a passenger.
Staff at the enquiry counter in Vishwavidyalaya station gave incorrect platform information, causing me to miss my train.
No drinking water available at the cooler near platform 1 of Durgapuri station for the past several days.
Signage indicating the exit towards the bus stand at Alambagh Bus Station is missing, very confusing for first-time visitors.
Almost half the benches on the platform at Transport Nagar station are broken or missing a backrest.
The public wifi at Hazratganj station shows connected but never actually loads any webpage.
Lighting in the underground parking area at Munshipulia station is very dim, feels unsafe after dark.
AC inside the train coaches barely works during afternoon hours, gets uncomfortably warm especially in summer.
There is no seating shade at the bus feeder pickup point outside Badshahnagar station, passengers wait in direct sun.
The digital display board at Charbagh station showing next train timing has been stuck on the same time for two days.
Ramp near gate 2 of Vishwavidyalaya station is too steep and doesn't have a proper grip surface, risky when wet.
Public announcement system at IT College station is barely audible, especially near the far end of the platform.
Platform at Vishwavidyalaya station gets extremely overcrowded around 9 AM when college students are commuting, feels unsafe.
Unable to board the first two trains at Alambagh station during evening rush hour due to overcrowding, had to wait almost 20 minutes.
There is no queue management or crowd barriers near the AFC gates at Charbagh station during peak hours, leads to pushing.
Coaches were packed way beyond comfortable capacity around 6 PM, could barely find space to hold the handrail.
Suggest adding more coaches or increasing frequency near Hazratganj station between 5:30 and 7 PM, it's consistently overcrowded.
Elderly and pregnant passengers struggle to find seats during rush hour with no separate boarding queue being enforced.
Crowd control near the entry gates at Munshipulia station was almost non-existent during a college festival rush, quite chaotic.
Overcrowding on the platform at Badshahnagar makes it hard to maintain a safe distance from the platform edge.
During the cricket match crowd rush near KD Singh Babu Stadium station, staff seemed understaffed to manage the volume of passengers.
Waiting area outside Amausi station gets overcrowded with autos and taxis blocking pedestrian movement during office hours.
The UPMRC mobile app crashes every time I try to view my trip history.
QR code generated for my booked ticket on the app doesn't load properly on slower internet connections.
App shows 'payment failed' but the amount was deducted from my bank account for a wallet top-up.
Unable to reset my password on the metro app, the OTP never arrives even after multiple attempts.
The live train tracking feature on the website hasn't been updated in what looks like several months.
Booking a ticket for a group of passengers through the app doesn't allow more than 2 tickets per transaction, quite inconvenient.
App notification said my card was successfully linked, but scanning it at the gate still shows 'card not registered'.
The FAQ and contact page on the official website returns a broken link when trying to raise a support ticket.
Fare calculator on the app gave a different amount than what was actually charged at the AFC gate.
Dark mode in the app makes some of the text unreadable due to poor color contrast.
Just want to appreciate how clean and well-maintained the coaches were on my ride today, genuinely pleasant experience.
The staff at Charbagh station helped my elderly mother find the right platform very patiently, thank you.
Trains have been running exactly on time all week on my route, really appreciate the consistency.
Suggestion: it would help to have a mobile charging point near the waiting benches at major stations.
The new digital display boards at Hazratganj station are a great improvement, much easier to read now.
Would be great if UPMRC introduced a Hindi-language option on the ticket booking app for wider accessibility.
Really appreciated the quick response from station staff when I lost my card near the AFC gate at Munshipulia, they helped immediately.
Great experience today, the security check was quick and the staff were courteous throughout.
Suggestion: adding more feeder bus connectivity near Amausi station would encourage more people to use the metro.
The overall smoothness of the ride and punctuality this month has honestly improved my daily commute a lot, well done.
